title: Nee Yaaro Yaaro Lyrics Kaththi Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Nee Yaaro
Singer: K.J. Yesudas
Music: Anirudh
Movie: Kaththi 

Yaar pettra magano
nee yaar pettra magano nee
indha oor kumbidum
kulasaami ivan

Oor seidha thavamo
indha oor seidha thavamo
mannai kaappaatridum
ivan aadhi sivan

adiverr thandha vervaikku
eedillaye.
Indha oor pookkum
neraththil nee illaye

Yaaro yaaro nee yaaro
inbam thandha kaneero

yaar pettra magano
nee yaar pettra magano nee
indha oor kumbidum
kulasaami ivan

kai veesum poongaathe
nee engu ponaayo
yaarendru sollaamal
sollaamal nizhal pola nadandhayo

Murai thaan oru muraithaan
unai paarthaal adhu varamey
ninaiththaaal unnai ninaiththal
kannil kanneer mazhai varumey.

Yaaro yaaro nee yaaro
inbam thandha kaneero

yaar pettra magano
nee yaar pettra magano nee
indha oor kumbidum
kulasaami ivan

adiverr thandha vervaikku
eedillaye.
Indha oor pookkum
neraththil nee illaye

Yaaro yaaro nee yaaro
inbam thandha kaneero

Yaar pettra magano
nee yaar pettra magano nee
indha oor kumbidum
kulasaami ivan

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Nee Yaaro Yaaro'?

The song expresses feelings of longing and nostalgia, reflecting on lost love and memories.

How does this song fit into the plot of the movie Kaththi?

In Kaththi, the song underscores the protagonist's emotional struggles and connections to his past.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by K.J. Yesudas and composed by Anirudh.

When was 'Nee Yaaro Yaaro' released?

The song was released on September 17, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Nee Yaaro Yaaro, K.J. Yesudas delivers a poignant performance that encapsulates the themes of love and loss prevalent in Kaththi. The song's melancholic tone and evocative lyrics create a deep emotional connection, making it a standout piece in the film's soundtrack. It beautifully conveys the protagonist's internal struggles and longing for a lost connection. This melody resonates with anyone who has experienced similar feelings, making it a timeless classic.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Nee Yaaro Yaaro from Kaththi is a hauntingly beautiful melody that captures the essence of longing and nostalgia. With K.J. Yesudas's soulful voice and Anirudh's masterful composition, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced love and loss. Dive into this emotional journey that perfectly complements the film's narrative.
stanzaMeanings: Who are you, who are you? This person is the one who brings joy to this place.
Is this place a result of mistakes? This person protects the land like a god.
There is no one to give strength to this place. You are not here when the flowers bloom.
Who are you, who are you? You bring happiness like tears of joy.
Who are you, who are you? This person is the one who brings joy to this place.
Where have you gone without saying who you are? You walked like a shadow without a word.
If I think of you when I see you, tears will fall from my eyes.
Who are you, who are you? You bring happiness like tears of joy.
Who are you, who are you? This person is the one who brings joy to this place.
There is no one to give strength to this place. You are not here when the flowers bloom.
Who are you, who are you? You bring happiness like tears of joy.
Who are you, who are you? This person is the one who brings joy to this place.
